evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: Fábrica Nacional de Moneda y Timbre - Real Casa de la Moneda, Entidad Pública Empresarial, Medio Propio (FNMT-RCM) is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Spain. It provides digital trust services via cert.fnmt.es.
